Hollywood stars, athletes and designers took to a track-themed red carpet for the Prelude—a celebration of the Paris Olympic Games on the eve of the Opening Ceremony.Picture:Supplied

Hollywood stars, athletes and designers took to a track-themed red carpet for the Prelude— a celebration of the Paris Olympic Games on the eve of the Opening Ceremony.

The City of Light sparkled with glitz and glamour on Thursday night as famous faces from the sporting, fashion and cinema worlds collided for an evening celebrating the event that unites the globe.

Aussies Ian Thorpe, Miranda Kerr and Baz Luhrmann joined a host of celebrities including sports stars LeBron James, Novak Djokovic, Serena Williams and Tyrese Haliburton.

Other glamorous guests included Steven Spielberg, Mick Jagger, Spike Lee, Zendaya, Snoop Dogg, Tyla, Jeremy Allen White, Queen Latifah, Alan Cumming and Charlize Theron.

Held at the Louis Vuitton Foundation in the French capital, it was hosted by Pharrell Williams, Vogue’s Anna Wintour, LVMH chairman and chief executive Bernard Arnault and Comcast NBCUniversal chairman and chief executive Brian Roberts.

The guests dined on delicacies by Michelin-starred chef Jean Imbert and cocktails provided by Moët Hennessy.

Pharrell Williams raved about the event at the start of the month saying how the Olympics connected nations across the world.

“It’s an honour for me to co-host this very special event with Anna, Mr Arnault, and Brian the night before the momentous Opening Ceremony,” he toldVogue.

“The Olympics are a celebration of diversity, humanity, and creativity — all of which bring us closer together as one human race. The Olympics are a humbling reminder that there is so much more that unites us than divides us. There is so much beauty in sport, and we will be celebrating this joyous time in a very special way.”

LeBron James, Lindsey Vonn and Novak Djokovic.Picture:Victor Boyko/Getty Images for LVMH x Vogue x

Charlize Theron.Picture:Julien M. Hekimian/Getty Images for LVMH x Vogue x

Baz Luhrman and Novak Djokovic.Picture:Victor Boyko/Getty Images for LVMH x Vogue x
title: Paris Olympics 2024: LeBron James, Serena Williams, Zendaya, Snoop Dogg gather for the Prelude ahead of Games | PerthNow
description: Paris glimmered with the sparkle of athletes, actors and singers who gathered at a glamorous celebration on the evening of the Olympics Opening Ceremony.
